product.name: T-1024-36-SS Commercial Restroom Mirror, 24-inch x 36-inch
product.description: This mirror is fabricated from 18-gauge type 304 stainless steel. The corners are tightly mitered and the edges are protected by cushioned 3m adhesive strips to prevent damage. Backs are secured by continuous industrial adhesive sealant and a galvanized steel back plate for added rigidity. The one-quarter inch float glass mirror is silvered and copper-plated by galvanic process and carries a full silver spoilage. The mirror dimension is 24-inches wide by 36-inches tall. This product is manufactured in the USA using USA labor and USA sourced raw materials.
features: Fabricated from high quality 18 gauge brushed finish stainless steel
Made in the USA using USA-sourced raw materials and labor
Engineered to install in half the time of competitor mirrors
Mirrors meet federal specifications one-quarter inch float glass silvered and electrolytic ally cop
Mirror edges are protected by cushioned adhesive strips to prevent damage
